query:
-- Today's plan should show status=skipped now
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, LEFT(notes, 200) AS notes
FROM dailyPlans
WHERE date = '2026-05-15';

-- Tuesday May 19's queued blocks
SELECT id, blockType, title, durationMin, startTime, status
FROM scheduleBlocks
WHERE planId = 780001
ORDER BY sortOrder, id;

-- Wednesday May 20's queued blocks
SELECT id, blockType, title, durationMin, startTime, status
FROM scheduleBlocks
WHERE planId = 870002
ORDER BY sortOrder, id;
